channel.title: Puffs of Smoke
channel.description: Pipes, product, and leadership musings from technologist Jon Kohlmeier.

item.title: What Gets Priority? An Exercise in Discovering Core Values
item.description: Why I paused to define the five values that guide my decisions at home and at work.

item.title: Evening Routine
item.description: How I wind down each weekday to reflect, recharge, and prep for the next day.

item.title: Falling into Web Development
item.description: How a failed semester, a Dreamweaver site, and generous mentors pulled me into a web career.

item.title: Morning Routine
item.description: The weekday ritual that helps me start each day centered, caffeinated, and ready to lead.

item.title: Weekly Things – February 09, 2019
item.description: A quick rundown of what I watched, read, listened to, and enjoyed at the start of 2019.
